landing.badge: Law of Attraction · Goal Manifestation Platform
landing.subheadline: Your thoughts create your reality. Visualize your goals, build powerful daily habits, and watch your dreams transform into achievements — one intention at a time.
landing.everythingSubtitle: A complete system to turn your intentions into reality, built on proven Law of Attraction principles.
landing.joinThousands: Join thousands of people who are already manifesting their dreams with ManifestHub. Start for free, no credit card needed.

features.visualDreamBoardDesc: Create stunning vision boards with images, quotes, and goals. Bring your dreams to life in a visual canvas.
features.dailyHabitsDesc: Build a powerful daily practice with check-ins, gratitude journaling, and streak tracking.
features.trackProgressDesc: Monitor every goal with progress bars, milestones, and an interactive calendar to stay on track.

01.title: Create Your Vision
01.desc: Add your dreams as vision cards with images, descriptions, and emotional anchors.

02.title: Build Daily Rituals
02.desc: Check in every day, write gratitude, and recite your personalized affirmations.

03.title: Manifest & Celebrate
03.desc: Track your progress, complete goals, and celebrate every win on your journey.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1: We collect information you provide directly to us when you create an account, including your name, email address, and any content you add to your vision board, goals, and gratitude journal. We also collect usage data such as the features you use and how often you check in, to help us improve the product experience.
s2Items: Send you product updates if you opt in
privacy.s2Outro: We do not sell your personal data to third parties.
privacy.s3: Your data is securely stored using Google Firebase (Firestore), hosted in the United States. Firebase employs industry-standard encryption at rest and in transit. Vision board images are stored as compressed base64 data within your Firestore documents and are never shared with other users.
privacy.s4: We use Firebase Authentication to manage sign-in. You may sign in with email/password or Google OAuth. We never store your raw passwords — all credentials are managed by Firebase's secure authentication system.
privacy.s5: We use browser localStorage to remember your theme preference, language, and session state. We do not use tracking cookies or third-party advertising networks.
privacy.s6: You may request deletion of your account and all associated data at any time by contacting us. We will process the request within 30 days.
privacy.s7: We may update this policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or an in-app notice.
privacy.s8: Questions about this policy? Reach out at

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1: By accessing or using ManifestHub, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the service.
terms.s2: ManifestHub is a personal goal visualization and manifestation tool that allows users to create vision boards, set goals, track daily check-ins, and maintain a gratitude journal. The service is provided "as is" for personal, non-commercial use.
s3Items: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
All activity that occurs under your account
Ensuring your account information remains accurate and up to date
terms.s4Intro: You agree not to use ManifestHub to:
s4Items: Upload content that is illegal, harmful, or violates the rights of others
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to any part of the service
Use automated means (bots, scrapers) to interact with the service
Interfere with the performance or integrity of the service
terms.s5a: You retain full ownership of all content you create in ManifestHub — including vision board items, goals, journal entries, and uploaded images. By using the service, you grant us a limited license to store and display that content solely to provide the service to you.
terms.s5b: We will never use your personal content for advertising, training AI models, or sharing with third parties without your explicit consent.
terms.s6: We strive to maintain high availability but do not guarantee uninterrupted access. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue the service at any time with reasonable notice.
terms.s7: To the fullest extent permitted by law, ManifestHub shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s8: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.
terms.s9: Questions about these terms? Contact us at
